# [Clang] Assertion `!isValueDependent() && "Expression evaluator can't be called on a dependent expression."` failed since 17.0

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/175423

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 17.0.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/j14GaeWPr

## Program
```cpp
#include <iostream>
template <int &T> void FuncTemplate() { T; }
template <typename T> struct Container {
  static void Execute() {
    if (std::is_same_v<T, int>)
      ;
    static int InternalVar;
    FuncTemplate<InternalVar>;
  }
};
int main() { Container<char>::Execute; }
```

```bash
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/AST/ExprConstant.cpp:20560: bool clang::Expr::EvaluateAsInt(clang::Expr::EvalResult&, const clang::ASTContext&, clang::Expr::SideEffectsKind, bool) const: Assertion `!isValueDependent() && "Expression evaluator can't be called on a dependent expression."' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```

## Comments

### Comment 1 - keinflue

Also crashes with a different assertion on Clang 16 (https://godbolt.org/z/8GvoGnWsf):
```
clang++: /root/llvm-project/clang/lib/Sema/SemaTemplateInstantiate.cpp:4064: llvm::PointerUnion<clang::Decl*, llvm::SmallVector<clang::VarDecl*, 4>*>* clang::LocalInstantiationScope::findInstantiationOf(const clang::Decl*): Assertion `isa<LabelDecl>(D) && "declaration not instantiated in this scope"' failed.
```

This assertion appears until Clang 21 if 
```cpp
if (std::is_same_v<T, int>)
      ;
```
is removed from the test case, but seems to be fixed on trunk.

## Program
```cpp
#include &lt;iostream&gt;

template &lt;typename T&gt; struct Container {
  static void Execute() {
    if (std::is_same_v&lt;T, int&gt;)
      ;
    static int InternalVar;
    FuncTemplate&lt;InternalVar&gt;;
  }
};
int main() { Container&lt;char&gt;::Execute; }
```
